hypothesis: Establish baseline ladder (5 factor rungs) and verify engine parity vs v3 ground truth
what_i_did: (1) Bootstrapped quant_research/ directory structure. (2) Ran data integrity checks: 353 feature snapshots 1997-2026, 1833 tickers, 280 PIT monthly snapshots 2003-2026. Split adjustments are clean (adjusted prices continuous). (3) Built backtest engine from scratch, discovered and fixed date mismatch (BME vs ME dates), regime gate bug (was over-triggering on 200dma vs v3 tight gate), return source mismatch (ml_preds_v2 vs sp500_pit_retrain_preds). (4) Engine now has near-perfect parity: 39.4% CAGR vs 39.8% expected, Sharpe 0.949 vs 0.955. (5) Ran 5-rung factor baseline ladder. (6) Populated 20-idea backlog.

key_findings: Factor baselines peak at R3: 12.5% CAGR, Sharpe 0.795 — far below v3 ML
200dma regime gate over-triggers (46 vs 4 cash months for tight gate)
Sharpe 2.0 target requires monthly std <= 5.96% — current v3 is ~10.3%. Likely ceiling without leverage is ~1.5.

next_action: Run k=2 concentration sweep + IC-weighted regime gate experiment (exp_002)
